subcodes.first_line: O ye blessed souls! Your letter was received. I became informed with its details. Praise be to God that you have arisen to serve the Cause of God... The fundamental object is the promulgation of the Cause of God and the exaltation of the word of God. This is the power that will become effective in the very heart of the world... O thou world of humanity! Awake! Awake!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه نامه شما رسید و بر تفاصیل اطلاع حاصل گردید الحمد لله بکمال قوت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @universal peace; world unity, @spiritual transformation, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles
